query:
SELECT 'intakeFile' as source, questionId as location, fileName, createdAt 
FROM intakeFileAttachments WHERE uploadedBy = 'rbennett@tuscrad.com' AND createdAt >= '2026-05-19'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'note' as source, label as location, fileName, createdAt 
FROM orgNotes WHERE uploadedBy = 'rbennett@tuscrad.com' AND createdAt >= '2026-05-19'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
